forms.name: Dullform
forms.summary: The unspecialized starting form. Lets you pass as a "parshman" but grants no other benefit.

forms.name: Mateform
forms.summary: Specialized for reproduction. No combat benefits.

forms.name: Artform
forms.summary: Gain the Painting and Music expertises, and an advantage on Crafting tests and tests to entertain (singing, dancing).

forms.name: Nimbleform
forms.summary: Your maximum and current focus both increase by 2 while in this form, reverting when you change form.

forms.name: Mediationform
forms.summary: You can use the Aid reaction without spending focus.

forms.name: Scholarform
forms.summary: Temporarily gain one cultural or utility expertise plus a rank in a non-surge cognitive skill of your choice.

forms.name: Warform
forms.summary: Deflect +1 (doesn't stack with worn armor), and you can jump a horizontal distance up to your movement rate or vertical up to half your movement rate without an Athletics test.

forms.name: Workform
forms.summary: Ignore the Exhausted condition, and you can easily disguise yourself as a "parshman."

forms.name: Direform
forms.summary: Deflect +2 (doesn't stack with armor), and when you trigger a Reactive Strike you can attempt to Grapple instead of attacking (still costs 1 focus).

forms.name: Stormform
forms.summary: Deflect +1 (doesn't stack with armor), and you gain Unleash Lightning: spend 1 focus or 1 Investiture to make a ranged Discipline attack (60 feet) vs. Physical defense for 2d8 energy damage (2d10 at 4 Discipline ranks, 2d12 at 5 or more), Disorienting the target on a hit.

forms.name: Envoyform
forms.summary: You speak, read, write, and understand all languages, with an advantage on Insight tests to read others' intentions.

forms.name: Relayform
forms.summary: Ignore the Slowed condition, and you can spend 1 focus to gain an advantage on an Agility, Stealth, or Thievery test.

forms.name: Decayform
forms.summary: Gain Decaying Touch: spend 1 focus or 1 Investiture to stop a character you touch from recovering health or focus before they do so (any resources they already spent stay spent).

forms.name: Nightform
forms.summary: Your maximum and current focus both increase by 2 while in this form. You also gain Intervening Premonitions (preroll two d20s at the start of each session; substitute one for a sensed character's roll after seeing it but before its effects resolve, losing that number once used) and occasional GM-granted glimpses of the future (Sporadic Premonitions).
